name: iBio, Inc.
summary: iBio, Inc. is a preclinical stage biotechnology company using Artificial Intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) to develop precision antibody therapeutics targeting obesity and cardiometabolic diseases. Key pipeline assets include IBIO-600 (anti-myostatin antibody) and IBIO-610 (Activin E antibody), developed via an AI-enabled epitope steering and antibody optimization platform. The company operates from a San Diego R&D laboratory and anticipates first human clinical trials in late fiscal 2026 or early fiscal 2027.
